questions.q: On May 8, 2026, Novak Djokovic suffered a loss in his first match since March at the Italian Open to which 20-year-old Croatian qualifier?
In May 2026, FIFA sparked widespread backlash after it tripled the price of its best available tickets for the upcoming World Cup final to what amount?
Which Real Madrid player was taken to the hospital with a head injury following a reported dressing room fight with teammate Aurélien Tchouaméni in May 2026?
Which former U.S. President criticized FIFA's $32,970 World Cup final ticket prices on May 8, 2026, stating 'I wouldn't pay it either'?
Following the early May 2026 semi-finals, which English club advanced to face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League final in Budapest?
